title: Skill Gap Analysis
text:
import pandas as pd

skills_data = {
    "Name": ["Meera", "Simon", "Mia", "Keily"],
    "Python": [3, 3, 2, 3],
    "SQL": [4, 2, 2, 2],
    "Machine Learning": [3, 5, 5, 3],
    "Cloud Computing": [3, 3, 5, 2]
}

df_skills = pd.DataFrame(skills_data)
df_skills.set_index("Name", inplace=True)
print(df_skills)

       Python  SQL  Machine Learning  Cloud Computing
Name                                                 
Meera       3    4                 3                3
Simon       3    2                 5                3
Mia         2    2                 5                5
Keily       3    2                 3                2

title: Skill Gap Analysis
